314	
315	// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
316	#define MAKE_DLINK_HEAD(OBJCLASS, LISTNAME)																						\
317	public:																																								\
318		inline DLINK_ITERATOR<OBJCLASS> iterate_##LISTNAME() const													\
319		{																																										\
320			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head), ("bogus head ptr"));	\
321			return DLINK_ITERATOR<OBJCLASS>(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head, OBJCLASS::dlink_next_##LISTNAME);	\
322		}																																										\
323		inline OBJCLASS *getFirstItemIn_##LISTNAME() const																	\
324		{																																										\
325			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head), ("bogus head ptr"));	\
326			return m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head;																							\
327		}																																										\
328		inline Bool isInList_##LISTNAME(OBJCLASS* o) const																	\
329		{																																										\
330			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head), ("bogus head ptr"));	\
331			return o->dlink_isInList_##LISTNAME(&m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head);							\
332		}																																										\
333		inline void prependTo_##LISTNAME(OBJCLASS* o)																				\
334		{																																										\
335			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head), ("bogus head ptr"));	\
336			if (!isInList_##LISTNAME(o))																											\
337				o->dlink_prependTo_##LISTNAME(&m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head);									\
338		}																																										\
339		inline void removeFrom_##LISTNAME(OBJCLASS* o)																			\
340		{																																										\
341			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head), ("bogus head ptr"));	\
342			if (isInList_##LISTNAME(o))																												\
343				o->dlink_removeFrom_##LISTNAME(&m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head);									\
344		}																																										\
345		typedef void (*RemoveAllProc_##LISTNAME)(OBJCLASS* o);															\
346		inline void removeAll_##LISTNAME(RemoveAllProc_##LISTNAME p = NULL)									\
347		{																																										\
348			while (m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head)																							\
349			{																																									\
350				DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head), ("bogus head ptr"));\
351				OBJCLASS *tmp = m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head;																	\
352				removeFrom_##LISTNAME(tmp);																											\
353				if (p) (*p)(tmp);																																\
354			}																																									\
355		}																																										\
356		inline void reverse_##LISTNAME()																										\
357		{																																										\
358			OBJCLASS* cur = m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head;																		\
359			OBJCLASS* prev = NULL;																														\
360			while (cur)																																				\
361			{																																									\
362				OBJCLASS* originalNext = cur->dlink_next_##LISTNAME();													\
363				cur->dlink_swapLinks_##LISTNAME();																							\
364				prev = cur;																																			\
365				cur = originalNext;																															\
366			}																																									\
367			m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME.m_head = prev;																							\
368		}																																										\
369	private:																																							\
370		/* a trick: init head to zero */																										\
371		struct DLINKHEAD_##LISTNAME																													\
372		{																																										\
373		public:																																							\
374			OBJCLASS* m_head;																																	\
375			inline DLINKHEAD_##LISTNAME() :																										\
376				m_head(0) { }																																		\
377			inline ~DLINKHEAD_##LISTNAME()																										\
378				{ DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!m_head,("destroying dlinkhead still in a list " #LISTNAME)); }				\
379		};																																									\
380		DLINKHEAD_##LISTNAME m_dlinkhead_##LISTNAME;	
381	
382	// ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
383	#define MAKE_DLINK(OBJCLASS, LISTNAME)	\
384	public:																	\
385		OBJCLASS* dlink_prev_##LISTNAME() const { return m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev; }										\
386		OBJCLASS* dlink_next_##LISTNAME() const	{ return m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next; }										\
387		void dlink_swapLinks_##LISTNAME()																									\
388		{																																													\
389			OBJCLASS* originalNext = m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next;																			\
390			m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next = m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev;																	\
391			m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev = originalNext;																								\
392		}																																													\
393		Bool dlink_isInList_##LISTNAME(OBJCLASS* const* pListHead) const										\
394		{																																													\
395			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(*pListHead) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev), ("bogus ptrs")); \
396			return *pListHead == this || m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev || m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next;		\
397		}																																													\
398		void dlink_prependTo_##LISTNAME(OBJCLASS** pListHead)															\
399		{																																													\
400			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!dlink_isInList_##LISTNAME(pListHead), ("already in list " #LISTNAME));					\
401			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(*pListHead) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev), ("bogus ptrs")); \
402			m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next = *pListHead;																									\
403			if (*pListHead)																																					\
404				(*pListHead)->m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev = this;																				\
405			*pListHead = this;																																			\
406			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(*pListHead) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev), ("bogus ptrs")); \
407		}																																													\
408		void dlink_removeFrom_##LISTNAME(OBJCLASS** pListHead)															\
409		{																																													\
410			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(dlink_isInList_##LISTNAME(pListHead), ("not in list" #LISTNAME));			\
411			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(*pListHead) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev), ("bogus ptrs")); \
412			if (m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next)																													\
413				m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next->m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev = m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev;			\
414			if (m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev)																													\
415				m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev->m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next = m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next;			\
416			else																																										\
417				*pListHead = m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next;																								\
418			m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev = 0;																													\
419			m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next = 0;																													\
420			DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!BOGUSPTR(*pListHead) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_next) && !BOGUSPTR(m_dlink_##LISTNAME.m_prev), ("bogus ptrs")); \
421		}																																													\
422	private:																\
423		/* a trick: init links to zero */			\
424		struct DLINK_##LISTNAME								\
425		{																			\
426		public:																\
427			OBJCLASS* m_prev;										\
428			OBJCLASS* m_next;										\
429			inline DLINK_##LISTNAME() :					\
430				m_prev(0), m_next(0) { }					\
431			inline ~DLINK_##LISTNAME()					\
432				{ DEBUG_ASSERTCRASH(!m_prev && !m_next,("destroying dlink still in a list "  #LISTNAME)); } \
433		};																		\
434		DLINK_##LISTNAME m_dlink_##LISTNAME;

441	template<class OBJCLASS>
442	class DLINK_ITERATOR
443	{
444	public:
445		// this is the weird C++ syntax for "pointer-to-member-function"
446		typedef OBJCLASS* (OBJCLASS::*GetNextFunc)() const;	
447	private:
448		OBJCLASS* m_cur;
449		GetNextFunc m_getNextFunc;	// this is the weird C++ syntax for "pointer-to-member-function"
450	public:
451		DLINK_ITERATOR(OBJCLASS* cur, GetNextFunc getNextFunc) : m_cur(cur), m_getNextFunc(getNextFunc) 
452		{ 
453		}
454		
455		void advance()
456		{ 
457			if (m_cur)
458				m_cur = callMemberFunction(*m_cur, m_getNextFunc)();
459		}
460		
461		Bool done() const
462		{ 
463			return m_cur == NULL; 
464		}
465	
466		OBJCLASS* cur() const 
467		{ 
468			return m_cur; 
469		}
470	
471	};

### 2. KEY TYPES AND CONSTANTS FROM GameCommon.h

- `MSEC_PER_SECOND = 1000`

### 7. KEY GAME STATE STRUCTURES

**Main Game State:**
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/GameLogic.h` - Core game state singleton
  - Manages all objects, players, teams, scoring
  - Frame counter and timing
  - Game modes (GAME_SINGLE_PLAYER, GAME_LAN, GAME_SKIRMISH, GAME_REPLAY, GAME_SHELL, GAME_INTERNET, GAME_NONE)
  - CRC validation for multiplayer
  - Load/save functionality

**Player Structure:**
- `/GameEngine/Include/Common/Player.h` - Player entity
  - Persistent data (rank, academy stats) and transient mission data
  - `PlayerRelationMap` - Relationship map between players
  - `SpecialPowerReadyTimerType` - Special ability cooldown tracking
  - Supports human and computer-controlled players
  - Team affiliations, science/upgrade tracking, money, energy
  - `NUM_HOTKEY_SQUADS = 10` - Hotkey group management

**Object (Unit/Building) Structure:**
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/Object.h` - Base game object
  - Inherits from: `Thing` and `Snapshot`
  - Unique `ObjectID` for referencing
  - Owner `Player` reference
  - Team membership via `AIGroup`
  - Physical properties (position, orientation, velocity)
  - Drawable association for rendering
  - Status bits (shrouded, experience, health)
  - Module system:
    - `BehaviorModuleInterface` - Behavioral updates
    - `BodyModuleInterface` - Physical body
    - `DamageModuleInterface` - Damage tracking
    - `UpdateModuleInterface` - Unit-specific updates
    - `WeaponSetFlags`, `WeaponStatus` - Weapon management
  - Supports: experience/veterancy, special powers, upgrades, contain modules
  - Polygon trigger tracking for area effects

**Object Types:**
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/ObjectTypes.h` - Unit/building type definitions

**Related Structures:**
- `/GameEngine/Include/Common/Team.h` - Team grouping
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/Module/StealthUpdate.h` - Stealth/invisibility
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/WeaponSet.h` - Weapon configurations
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/Damage.h` - Damage calculation
- `/GameEngine/Include/Common/Upgrade.h` - Upgrade tracking
- `/GameEngine/Include/GameLogic/ObjectCreationList.h` - Object iteration

This is a sophisticated, modular RTS engine with 30 FPS logic updates, advanced AI with state machines and pathfinding, module-based object architecture, and complete multiplayer/networking support.
